## History

Open commit details
[View commit history for this file.](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/commits/main/) 3 Commits | | [Spine 2D](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/tree/main/Spine%202D "Spine 2D") | [Spine 2D](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/tree/main/Spine%202D "Spine 2D") | [Add all Spine assets for Base & Battle](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/commit/1fb77e6c00310c155d2c368bdc8872be973f2739 "Add all Spine assets for Base & Battle Signed-off-by: Bayu Satiyo ") | 2 years agoAug 12, 2024 | | [README.md](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/blob/main/README.md "README.md") | [README.md](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/blob/main/README.md "README.md") | [Add all Spine assets for Base & Battle](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/commit/1fb77e6c00310c155d2c368bdc8872be973f2739 "Add all Spine assets for Base & Battle Signed-off-by: Bayu Satiyo ") | 2 years agoAug 12, 2024 | | View all files | ## Repository files navigation # Arknights Game Resources [Permalink: Arknights Game Resources](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base#arknights-game-resources) \[Last updated on v24.2.21\] ## Overview [Permalink: Overview](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base#overview) This repository contains [Arknights](https://arknights.global/ "Arknights") game assets such as character [spine](http://en.esotericsoftware.com/ "Spine 2D") \+ Spine project, UI, etc. that usable to be used in many ways. Checkout my other project on collecting [Blue Archive](https://bluearchive.nexon.com/home "Visit Blue Archive official website") game assets: [Schale-Archive](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Schale-Archive "Schale-Archive") ## How to Properly Import Character to Spine Editor [Permalink: How to Properly Import Character to Spine Editor](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base#how-to-properly-import-character-to-spine-editor) - First, you **must** have Spine Editor v3.8.x because Arknights characters spine is produced in Spine Editor v.3.8.99. - Create a new project. - Delete the default skeleton in `Hierarchy` on the right. - Click Spine logo on top left, then select `Import Data`. - Select skeleton data (`.skel`) file. Uncheck `New Project` and select `Create a new skeleton`. Name it whatever you want then `Import`. - After successfuly imported, click Spine logo and select `Texture Unpacker`. Select atlas (`.atlas`) file where the texture is located and set the output folder then `Import`. - After imported, click `Images` in `Hierarchy`. Set the path on botttom right to where the unpacked texture is located. - That's it, you have successfully import the character to Spine Editor. - If you want to see the animations, click `SETUP` on top left then expand the `Animations` in `Hierarchy`. Click `little dot` on the left of animation name and click Play Backward `<` or Play Forward `>` in the `Dopesheet` on the bottom left. ## Disclaimer [Permalink: Disclaimer](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base#disclaimer) The game assets in this repository is of course property and copyright of Hypergryph. ## About Arknights game assets & resources ### Topics [arknights](https://github.com/topics/arknights "Topic: arknights") [arknights-assets](https://github.com/topics/arknights-assets "Topic: arknights-assets") [arknights-resources](https://github.com/topics/arknights-resources "Topic: arknights-resources") ### Resources [Readme](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base#readme-ov-file) ### Uh oh! | | View all files | ## Repository files navigation # ⚔️ Arknights Buddy 😍 [Permalink: ⚔️ Arknights Buddy 😍](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy#%EF%B8%8F-arknights-buddy-) View Arknights Operator right on your screen as a companion! You can drag them anywhere on the screen & interact to it to see their cute reaction. They will wandering around on your screen and sometimes will sit and sleep. Please don't disturb them! ## 📖 How To Use [Permalink: 📖 How To Use](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy#-how-to-use) > !NOTE > > We aren't storing the asset files here to at least (maybe) avoid copyright infringement. > You can download them at here: [https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/tree/main/Spine%202D](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/Arknights-Base/tree/main/Spine%202D) or use your own. - Everytime you open the app, it will start as a little window on top right of your screen. Click it will expand the Console. - Bulk drop the Operator Spine asset files (`.atlas, .png, .skel`) and voices (if you want) at the Console window. Entering unsupported file type will resulting an error that you can see in the Console. - Operator is now spawned! You can drag them anywhere on the screen. Click to interact with them :D - Repeat the steps for a new Operator. ## 🤝 Contributing [Permalink: 🤝 Contributing](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy#-contributing) We welcome contributions to enhance this project! Feel free to suggest improvements, report bugs, or submit pull requests. Don't hesitate ;) ## ❤️ Credits [Permalink: ❤️ Credits](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy#%EF%B8%8F-credits) - This project is mainly inspired by [zarf](https://blog.csdn.net/izarfy "See zarf profile on CSDN") on his writeup [【发布】Arknights（明日方舟）拆包+桌面精灵](https://blog.csdn.net/izarfy/article/details/106681264) - [kirurobo](https://github.com/kirurobo/ "See kirurobo GitHub profile") for the amazing library [UniWindowController](https://github.com/kirurobo/UniWindowController "See UniWindowController GitHub repository") ## 📜 Licenses [Permalink: 📜 Licenses](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy#-licenses) This project is licensed under [MIT License](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy/blob/main/LICENSE "See LICENSE file"). Spine Runtimes is licensed under [Spine Runtimes License Agreement](https://esotericsoftware.com/spine-runtimes-license). ## ⚠️ Disclaimer [Permalink: ⚠️ Disclaimer](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy#%EF%B8%8F-disclaimer) Arknights is the property and copyright of Hypergryph and their affiliators. ## About ⚔️ Arknights Operators on your screen 💻 ### Resources [Readme](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy#readme-ov-file) ### License [MIT license](https://github.com/kiraio-moe/AK-Buddy#MIT-1-ov-file) ### Uh oh!
